name: claude-review
description: Run agentic Claude Opus 4.7 review passes, including explicit Opus 4.7 1M long-context mode, from inside Codex CLI sessions with full read-only tool access (Read/Glob/Grep/Bash/Task/WebFetch/WebSearch) and parallel sub-agent dispatch.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic Claude Opus 4.7 review of Codex changes, with explicit 1M long-context mode, read-only tool access, and sub-agent dispatch
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Review to run agentic high-scrutiny code review, adversarial design review, exhaustive deep multi-agent review, security-focused review, setup checks, and background review jobs from inside Codex CLI sessions using the local Claude CLI runtime. Reviewers operate in read-only mode with Read, Glob, Grep, Task (sub-agents), WebFetch, WebSearch, and Bash limited to a git-safe wrapper plus node/npm verification commands. Edits, writes, and shell mutations are blocked unless the user explicitly opts into --unrestricted.
defaultPrompt: Review the current Codex-generated changes with Claude and flag anything unsafe, brittle, or under-tested.
Run an exhaustive deep adversarial review with sub-agent dispatch on the current diff.
Run a security-focused Claude review on the current diff and map findings to OWASP/CWE.
